decision_maker_status.evidence: Aap bataiye aapka kya minimum plan rahega agar wo mere capable hoga, fine otherwise I will quit.

agent_promises: 7.1 percent interest annually from first year for lifetime

product_fit.mismatch_reason: The suggested premium of 60,000-1,00,000 INR is significantly higher than the customer's stated savings capacity.
missed_opportunities: Did not explore the customer's specific retirement needs beyond generic income pitch.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is open to discussing investment options but has a limited budget and is currently evaluating the feasibility of the proposed plan.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent Kunal introduced HDFC Life and a new plan for regular income, to which the customer responded with 'Bataiye'.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was passive but engaged, providing details when asked and pushing back on the suggested premium amount.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer rejected the 60,000 INR annual premium suggestion, citing existing LIC commitments.
call_narrative.ending: The call ended with the customer asking for clarification on the one-time investment plan structure.

key_quotes: Aap bataiye aapka kya minimum plan rahega agar wo mere capable hoga, fine otherwise I will quit.
Actual mein mera jo hai sir LIC mein hi is time ja rahi hai takreeban 12,000 rupaye.
